data.title: Liquidnet appoints Michael Gibbons from Morgan Stanley as Global Head of Listed Derivatives Business Development in NYC.
data.description: In New York today, Liquidnet, a prominent agency execution specialist driven by technology, revealed Michael Gibbons as the new Global Head of Listed Derivatives Business Development. With over 12 years of experience at Morgan Stanley overseeing electronic futures sales worldwide, Gibbons will be spearheading the company's international growth plans for listed derivatives. He will be stationed in New York and will report to Marianna Rayetskyy, Global Head of Listed Derivatives at Liquidnet.

data.title: Tavant launches TOUCHLESS® Servicing Portal with Agentic AI Assistant for 24/7 borrower self-service; supports 400,000 borrowers.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, Tavant, a prominent platform-powered AI consultant for lenders, has introduced the TOUCHLESS® Servicing Portal. This expansion of the TOUCHLESS platform beyond origination into post-close servicing offers a seamless experience for borrowers to handle their mortgage process from application to servicing in a single location. The servicing portal is currently catering to over 400,000 borrowers across the country. This initiative aims to streamline the mortgage journey for borrowers.

data.title: Starburst achieves $100M ARR, $20M AI run rate, 40% YoY growth, signaling shift from BI to AI in enterprises.
data.description: Boston-based company Starburst, known for its data and AI platforms, revealed today that it achieved over $100 million in annual recurring revenue within the last year. Additionally, the company hit a $20 million annual run rate for AI services and experienced a significant 40% year-over-year growth. These accomplishments signify a shift away from the dashboard era in enterprises. Rather than focusing solely on improving business intelligence pipelines, organizations are now prioritizing AI integration, recognizing that AI operations do not rely on traditional pipelines.

data.title: Global app installs rose 10% in 2025; sessions increased 7%. Adjust predicts multi-platform growth in 2026.
data.description: A report by Adjust, a prominent measurement and analytics firm, unveiled in San Francisco, highlights the ongoing global surge in mobile app usage across various sectors. The latest data for 2026 shows a 10% year-over-year (YoY) increase in global app installations and a 7% rise in app sessions compared to the previous year. This trend indicates a steady growth in mobile app engagement worldwide. Adjust forecasts a shift towards multi-platform usage among consumers in 2026, leading to heightened demand for integrated solutions.

data.title: Palogic Value Fund withdraws nominees and shareholder proposal at Pebblebrook Hotel Trust, letter issued on Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: Palogic Value Fund, LP and Palogic Value Management, LP have recently issued a letter to the Board of Trustees of Pebblebrook Hotel Trust on February 17, 2026. The letter was addressed to the Board at the company's location in Bethesda, Maryland. In the letter, Palogic expressed their enthusiasm for the recent actions taken by Pebblebrook. Pebblebrook Hotel Trust, a publicly traded company known by the ticker symbol PEB on the NYSE, received this communication from Palogic Value Fund, LP and Palogic Value Management, LP. The specific details and contents of the letter were not disclosed in the rephrased version.

data.title: Clipper Realty Inc. (NYSE: CLPR) to release Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 26, 2026, conference call at 5:00 PM ET.
data.description: Clipper Realty Inc. (NYSE: CLPR), a real estate company based in New York, disclosed that it will unveil its financial results for the quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, post-market closure on Thursday, February 26, 2026. Furthermore, the company plans to conduct a conference call on the same day at 5:00 PM (ET) to delve into the financial outcomes and deliver a business overview. This call will offer stakeholders and interested parties the opportunity to gain insights into the company's performance and strategic direction.

data.title: In January, a $55M Naples estate led the top home sales, followed by a $42M Aspen ranch and a $38M Hawaiian estate. Coastal Florida had 3 of the top 5 sales.
data.description: In January, a waterfront estate in Naples, FL emerged as the priciest home sale, clocking in at a hefty $55 million. This data comes from a recent report by Redfin, a real estate brokerage backed by Rocket. The second spot was claimed by an Aspen, CO ranch selling for $42 million, trailed closely by a Hawaiian beachfront estate on the Big Island that went for slightly over $38 million. Two more coastal Florida properties secured the fourth and fifth positions, reaching around $36 million each. Out of the top ten sales in January, six were coastal Florida properties.

data.title: QPharma introduces new digital sampling platform at medical congress, improving healthcare provider engagement.
data.description: In Morristown, New Jersey, QPharma® has introduced an innovative digital sampling experience designed for healthcare providers. This next-generation solution combines user-friendly technology with personalized representative support to enhance engagement. Demonstrated at a recent national medical congress, QPharma's digital sampling showcased the successful integration of digital innovation and regulatory compliance. The initiative, centered on the theme "Engage & Access," demonstrated the potential for improved engagement in the healthcare sector.

data.title: CDW CFO to speak at Morgan Stanley Conference on March 2, 2026 at 12:00 p.m. CT/10:00 a.m. PT. Webcast available.
data.description: CDW Corporation revealed that Albert J. Miralles, the CFO and EVP of enterprise business operations, will be attending a Q&A session at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco on March 2, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. CT/10:00 a.m. PT. The event can be viewed live on investor.cdw.com and a recorded version will be accessible afterwards. CDW is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CDW.

data.title: Renesas created 3 SoC technologies for automotive multi-domain ECUs, crucial for the SDV era.
data.description: Recently in Tokyo and San Francisco, Renesas introduced three new System-on-Chip (SoC) technologies designed for automotive multi-domain electronic control units (ECUs). These advancements are aimed at enhancing the efficiency and functionality of ECUs in vehicles.

data.title: Renesas unveils 3nm TCAM tech for auto SoCs, offering high memory density and low power; announced at ISSCC 2026.
data.description: Renesas, a major technology company based in Tokyo and San Francisco, has unveiled a groundbreaking development in the automotive sector. They have introduced a configurable ternary content-addressable memory (TCAM) that is constructed using a cutting-edge 3nm FinFET process. This announcement was made at the ISSCC conference in 2026, showcasing Renesas' commitment to innovation and advancement in the industry. This new TCAM technology is expected to revolutionize automotive systems with its efficiency and performance capabilities on such a small scale of 3nm.

data.title: Moonwell protocol exploited for $1.78M after cbETH mispriced at $1.12, sparking AI-assisted smart contract debate in DeFi.
data.description: An exploit occurred with the Moonwell protocol, resulting in a loss of $1.78 million. This exploit happened when cbETH was mistakenly priced at $1.12 instead of its correct value of around $2,200. This incident has sparked discussions regarding smart contracts co-authored by AI, adding fuel to the ongoing debate in the crypto community.

data.title: Windstar Cruises announces Winter 2027-2028 voyages with 230+ sailing dates, 21 new itineraries on 6 luxury yachts.
data.description: Windstar Cruises is embracing a shift in travel preferences by focusing on intimate small-ship journeys that emphasize unique experiences and deep cultural exploration. The cruise line has opened bookings for its Winter 2027-2028 season, showcasing over 230 sailing dates, introducing 21 new itineraries, and deploying six luxury yachts for global voyages. This move caters to travelers seeking to move away from overcrowded ports and standardized cruising, in favor of more personalized and culturally immersive adventures.

data.title: Establishment Labs (NASDAQ: ESTA) to present at TD Cowen's 46th Annual Health Care Conference on March 2, 2026 at 9:10 a.m. ET.
data.description: A company known as Establishment Labs Holdings Inc. will take part in TD Cowen's 46th Annual Health Care Conference. The corporation, listed as NASDAQ: ESTA, focuses on enhancing women's health, especially in breast aesthetics and reconstruction. The CEO, Peter Caldini, and CFO, Raj Denhoy, will be part of a fireside chat on March 2, 2026, at 9:10 a.m. ET during the event. The discussion will likely be available via a live webcast.

data.title: bibigo™ has launched ScrollSticks, chopsticks for digital age, with touchscreen tips, created for online foodies.
data.description: In Bloomington, Minnesota, bibigo™ has introduced a groundbreaking product tailored for modern consumers. Famous for their TikTok dumplings, the brand is now offering ScrollSticks - special chopsticks designed for the digital era. These limited-edition chopsticks feature touchscreen tips, catering to the online habits of food enthusiasts. By adapting traditional Korean metal chopsticks to suit the needs of internet-savvy users, bibigo™ is providing a unique way for fans to enjoy their favorite snack. This innovation reflects the brand's commitment to blending tradition with technology.

data.title: JBT Marel Corp. (JBTM) realigns segments, integrating operating model. Fourth quarter 2025 change impacts legacy JBT and Marel organizations.
data.description: In Chicago, JBT Marel Corporation (NYSE and Nasdaq Iceland: JBTM) revealed the implementation of its plan to reorganize reportable segments for the fourth quarter of 2025. The restructuring is a result of merging the operational models of legacy JBT and Marel entities. This move reflects the company's focus on high-value sectors within the food & beverage industry. The integration aims to enhance efficiency and streamline operations. This development marks a significant shift in the company's strategic framework.

data.title: Intellicheck report highlights widespread fraud risks across industries, predicting massive losses. $IDN's 2026 report analyzes evolving identity fraud, covering financial services, retail.
data.description: In Melville, New York, Intellicheck, Inc. (Nasdaq: IDN) a prominent identity verification company, has launched its first 2026 Intellicheck North America Identity Verification Threat Report. This report offers a detailed analysis of the evolving identity fraud scenario in financial services, retail, and other key sectors. Through proprietary data, the report aims to provide insights into the changing landscape of identity validation solutions. The company is known for its on-demand digital and physical identity verification services.

data.title: Sylvamo CEO will attend BofA's 2026 Global Ag & Materials Conf in FL, with CFO. Sylvamo is a global paper company.
data.description: Sylvamo (NYSE: SLVM), the leading paper company worldwide, is set to hold exclusive meetings on Feb. 25 at the BofA Securities 2026 Global Agriculture and Materials Conference in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. The CEO, John Sims, and CFO, Don Devlin, will be present at the event. Sylvamo, known for its mills in Europe, Latin America, and North America, is committed to being a prominent player in the paper industry.
